Class MultiplayerViewManager

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.MultiplayerViewManager
public class MultiplayerViewManager extends Object
Manages multiplayer view operations and UI state transitions. Handles showing multiplayer screen, starting/restarting games, quitting to main menu, and keyboard handler attachment.

    Description
    void
    attachKeyboardHandlersToScene()
    Attaches keyboard handlers to the scene for multiplayer mode.

    Binds the level property to the level label for a player.
    void

    Binds the score property to the score label for a player.
    void
    checkBothReady()
    Checks if both players are ready and starts the game if so.
    void
    clearMultiplayerGamePanels()
    Clears all multiplayer game panels (game panels, brick panels, ghost panels) and side panels (hold, next, score, level) by setting all rectangles to transparent/empty state and resetting labels to default values.

    • bindScore

      public void bindScore(javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty score, int playerNumber)
      Binds the score property to the score label for a player.
      Parameters:
      score - The score property to bind
      playerNumber - The player number (1 or 2)

    • bindLevel

      public void bindLevel(javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty level, int playerNumber)
      Binds the level property to the level label for a player.
      Parameters:
      level - The level property to bind
      playerNumber - The player number (1 or 2)

    • setBrickPanelsVisible

      public void setBrickPanelsVisible(boolean visible, SettingsPanel settingsPanel)
      Sets the visibility of brick panels and ghost panels for both players.
      Parameters:
      visible - Whether the panels should be visible
      settingsPanel - The settings panel to check ghost visibility setting
